briefdescription.para: Clamp speed to the valid range [-duty_max, +duty_max].
Apply the current speed to the motor outputs.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_DCMotor *motor, SYN_GPIO_Pin pin_a, SYN_GPIO_Pin pin_b, SYN_DCMotorMode mode)
memberdef.name: syn_dc_motor_init

detaileddescription.para: The callback is called with the pin and a duty value in [0, duty_max] whenever the motor speed changes.

parameterdescription.para: Speed in range [-duty_max, +duty_max]. Positive = forward, negative = reverse, 0 = stop. Clamped to ±duty_max.

briefdescription.para: Ramp to a target speed over a duration.
Stop the motor (coast — both pins low).
Brake the motor (both pins high, if driver supports it).
Set the maximum duty cycle value.

detaileddescription.para: Call after init to change from the default (1000). Resets speed to 0.

briefdescription.para: Create a SYN_MotorOutput interface for this DC motor.

detaileddescription.para: Returns a motor output vtable that maps set_output() to syn_dc_motor_set_speed(), coast() to syn_dc_motor_coast(), etc. The output range maps directly to [-duty_max, +duty_max].

parameterdescription.para: DC motor instance (must outlive the returned output).
